description_long: This is a contemporary multi-arm ceiling sconce featuring six evenly spaced, spherical white glass globes arranged radially around a central black and brass hub. Each globe is supported by a slender, metallic arm that extends outward from the central fixture, creating a starburst effect. The central hub is cylindrical and finished in a matte black, with subtle brass accents at the base of each arm, adding a touch of elegance. The globes are smooth and opaque, likely diffusing light softly when illuminated. The fixture is suspended from a straight, black rod, designed for ceiling mounting. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a minimalist aesthetic and a focus on geometric symmetry.
description: A modern ceiling sconce with six white glass globes on black and brass arms radiating from a central hub, suspended by a black rod. The design is sleek, symmetrical, and minimalist.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six glass globes and the symmetrical radial arrangement of the arms.
description_view_1: Side view revealing five globes, with one globe centered and the others partially obscured, highlighting the depth of the fixture.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying all six globes and the even spacing of the arms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing five globes and the central hub's profile.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern, minimalist design with geometric symmetry and a starburst arrangement. Brass accents and smooth glass globes add a touch of elegance to the contemporary style.
